title: melocactus ruestii subsp. maxonii
intro: Melocactus ruestii subsp. maxonii is a species of cactus native to Mexico, characterized by its distinctive, tree-like appearance and vibrant orange-red flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melocactus ruestii subsp. maxonii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the fruits and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or supplements.
